properties.entry: insert into ui_page(page_id, page_nm, page_desc) values (:pageId, :pageNm, :pageDesc)

insert into ui_elements(page_id, element_id, selector_text, class_names, ctnt_text, pos_left, pos_top, ui_width, ui_height, major_yn) values (:pageId, :elementId, :selectorText, :classNames, :ctntText, :posLeft, :posTop, :uiWidth, :uiHeight, :majorYn)
select page_id, page_nm, page_desc from ui_page order by page_id asc
select page_id , element_id , selector_text , class_names , ctnt_text , pos_left , pos_top , ui_width , ui_height , major_yn from ui_elements where page_id = :pageId order by element_id asc
select page_id , element_id , selector_text , class_names , ctnt_text , pos_left , pos_top , ui_width , ui_height , major_yn from ui_elements where page_id = :pageId and element_id = :elementId
insert into cluster_model(model_id, model_desc, model_json) values (:modelId, :modelDesc, :modelJson)
select model_id , model_desc , model_json from cluster_model where model_id = :modelId
select model_id , model_desc , '' as model_json from cluster_model order by model_id desc
